title: Omeka S
description: Open-source web publishing platform for sharing digital collections and creating media-rich exhibits, built for libraries, museums, and archives.
installation: There is no official Omeka S image; this uses the actively maintained community image giocomai/omeka-s-docker (Omeka S 4.x on PHP/Apache). Omeka S supports MySQL/MariaDB only, so a mariadb add-on is deployed. ROTATE the mariadb add-on password and the matching MYSQL_PASSWORD env before production. On first boot, complete the web installer at the app URL to create the admin account and the first site. The /var/www/html/volume path persists config (database.ini, local.config.php), uploaded files, themes, and modules across restarts.
